scripts.build: pnpm --filter agentcore-cdk-app build && (cd web && npx ampx sandbox --once) && node scripts/configure-agentcore-auth.js && (cd agent/default && npx @aws/agentcore deploy --target default) && node scripts/extract-deployment-info.js && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.destroy: pnpm --filter agent run destroy && (cd web && npx ampx delete --force)
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter web exec rm -rf .next && pnpm --filter agentcore-cdk-app run clean && find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf node_modules
